scripts.build: mkdir -p out && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile out/deepthink
scripts.build:mcp: mkdir -p out && bun build src/mcp-server.ts --compile --outfile out/deepthink-mcp
scripts.build:all: mkdir -p out && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile out/deepthink && bun build src/mcp-server.ts --compile --outfile out/deepthink-mcp
scripts.build:universal: mkdir -p out && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile out/deepthink-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile out/deepthink-x64
